title: The Whispering Gallery
setting: The Blackwood Museum of Antiquities. A haunted Victorian corridor where the echoes of the past are etched into the walls.

characters.name: Dr. Silas Vane
characters.description: A specialist in acoustic remnants, sent to silence the gallery once and for all.

items.name: Tuning Fork
items.description: A heavy steel fork designed to resonate at 440Hz. It hums with a faint, sympathetic vibration.

items.name: Brass Dial
items.description: A small, numbered dial from a Victorian safe mechanism. It reeks of machine oil.

items.name: Heavy Pry Bar
items.description: A solid length of octagonal steel. Perfectly balanced for prying open old secrets.

items.name: Spectral Lens
items.description: A violet-tinted glass lens in a leather frame. It allows the wearer to see frequencies normally invisible to the eye.

items.name: Golden Metronome
items.description: A masterpiece of horology. Its tick is the only sound that can anchor the echoes.

scenes.name: Grand Entrance
scenes.prose: The Blackwood Museum is a cathedral of still air and frozen history. Shafts of cold moonlight cut through the dust motes, illuminating a massive marble statue of a weeping angel in the center of the hall. The air is so quiet it rings. clutched in the angel's cold, stone hand is a heavy-tuning-fork, vibrating with a frequency you can feel in your teeth. To the north, the arched entrance to the Whispering Gallery beckons, its darkness filled with the sound of a thousand overlapping secrets.

lookDescriptions.weeping-angel: The detail is exquisite. She looks as if she's listening to a sound you can't hear.
lookDescriptions.dust-motes: They move in patterns that mimic sound-waves.
lookDescriptions.arched-entrance: Faded gold lettering above reads: THE WHISPERING GALLERY.

scenes.name: The Gallery
scenes.prose: The curved corridor stretches into the gloom, its walls lined with blank, peeling frescoes. The 'whispering' effect is active—every footstep you take echoes back as a distorted voice, a legacy of the artifacts stored here. To the west, a heavy oak door leads to the restoration room. To the north, the hallway ends in a circular door marked 'ECHO CHAMBER'. High on the east wall, a hidden compartment is visible behind a sliding stone panel, missing its control interface.

lookDescriptions.blank-frescoes: The paint has flaked away, leaving only a grey, absorbent surface.
lookDescriptions.wall-panel: A circular indentation in the stone looks exactly like the mounting for a brass-dial.
lookDescriptions.hidden-staircase: A spiral of iron steps hidden within the masonry, currently retracted.

scenes.name: Restoration Room
scenes.prose: The restoration room is a laboratory of chemicals and antiquity. Workbenches are cluttered with half-restored jars and scalpels. In the corner, a reinforced glass-case is vibrating so violently it's a blur, emitting a steady, high-pitched whine. A heavy iron-hatch is bolted into the floor, leading to the museum's under-vaults. The smell of ether and old paper is nearly overwhelming.

lookDescriptions.vibrating-case: The artifact inside is reacting to the latent energy in the building.
lookDescriptions.restoration-tools: Modern 1890s equipment. Everything is kept in clinical order.
lookDescriptions.iron-hatch: Reinforced with cross-bars. It requires serious leverage to open.

scenes.name: Curator Sanctum
scenes.prose: The Curator's study is a private island above the museum floor. Bookcases climb to the ceiling, filed with journals on 'The Physics of Haunting.' A massive desk stands in the center, covered in unread correspondence. A heavy-duty-pry-bar rests against the mahogany shelves, its steel surface reflecting the moonlight from the high window. The voices from the gallery below are muffled here, reduced to a low, rhythmic breathing.

lookDescriptions.curator-desk: Covered in notes about 'The Final Frequency.' The handwriting is erratic.
lookDescriptions.bookcases: Thousands of volumes on the occult and the acoustic.
lookDescriptions.high-window: Looking out at the foggy London streets. Reality feels very far away.

scenes.name: Under-Vault
scenes.prose: The under-vault is a cold, stone-walled womb where the museum's most sensitive items are kept in lead-lined safety. The air is stagnant and smells of iron. In the center, an open chest reveals a single spectral-lens, its violet glass drawing the light toward it. There are no other exits; the silence here is so absolute it's deafening.

lookDescriptions.lead-lining: Designed to dampen frequencies. It's working.
lookDescriptions.vault-chest: A heavy, brass-bound trunk. The lock has been neatly picked.
lookDescriptions.stone-walls: Scratched with hundreds of small tallies. Someone was counting the seconds.

scenes.name: Echo Chamber
scenes.prose: The destination. A perfect circular room at the end of the gallery. The walls are seamless, carved from a single piece of acoustic-reflective stone. The 'whispers' have reached a fever pitch here—a screaming wall of sound that vibrates in your very bones. In the center of the room stands a solitary central-pedestal, its top featuring a mounting plate designed for a rhythmic anchor. This is the source of the contagion.

lookDescriptions.circular-walls: They seem to be moving, pulsing with the intensity of the noise.
lookDescriptions.central-pedestal: The only motionless object in the room. It’s waiting for the end.
lookDescriptions.the-screaming: It’s not sound anymore. It’s a physical force.

puzzles.result: the tuning fork strikes the glass. The frequency matches perfectly, and the case shatters into harmless diamonds of glass, revealing a brass-dial.
You mount the dial and turn it to the sequence found in the Curator's notes. The masonry grinds aside, revealing the hidden staircase to the Sanctum.
With a pained groan of steel, the hatch is forced open. A narrow ladder leads down into the freezing darkness of the vault.
The violet lens reveals a hidden sequence of musical notes painted on the blank wall. A hidden compartment pops open, revealing a golden-metronome.
The metronome begins its steady tick. The screams falter, drawn into the relentless rhythm of the golden anchor. The gallery goes silent.

winCondition.description: The whispers fade. The museum is just a collection of stone and silence once more. You walk out into the dawn of a London morning, the only one who knows the truth of the Blackwood Museum. The end.
